cooperates.cooperate_desc: Best Synergies: Heroes with heavy AOE CC like Atlas, Tigreal, or Terizla. They group enemies together, allowing Xavier to hit multiple targets and stay in his enhanced state.

counters.counter_desc: Weak Against (Counters): High-mobility assassins like Lancelot, Fanny, and Ling who can bypass your front line and delete you instantly.

dominants.dominant_desc: Focus on clearing lanes. Do not play aggressively; you are a "support" mage until you get your first two items. Use your Ult to help other lanes or check the Lord/Turtle.
Once you have Clock of Destiny and Lightning Truncheon, your damage spikes. Rotate with your Roamer and use your S2+S1 combo to set up kills for your Jungler.
Stay behind your tank at all times. Use your range to poke. In a team fight, your goal is to stay in Stage III Transcendence as long as possible by constantly hitting targets.

emblems.emblem_desc:
TIER 1 ( RUPTURE )
- Provides extra Magic Penetration to help with early game damage.

TIER 2: (BARGAIN HUNTER or Weapons Master 
- Bargain Hunter allows you to get your expensive core items (Clock of Destiny/Lightning Truncheon) faster.

TIER 3: (IMPURE RAGE) 
-Deals extra adaptive damage and restores 2% Mana on hit, which is crucial for Xavier's spam-heavy playstyle.

equips.equip_desc:
[ MAGIC BOOTS]:
-Essential for Cooldown Reduction (CDR) to keep your passive active.

[ CLOCK OF DESTINY ]:
-Provides the HP and Mana stacks needed for his late-game scaling.

[ LIGHTNING TRUNCHEON ]:
-Synergizes with Clock of Destiny for massive burst damage.

[ ENCHANTED TALISMAN]:
-Mandatory for mana regeneration and 20% CDR.

[ HOLY CRYSTAL]:
-Massive Magic Power boost to maximize late-game scaling.

[ DIVINE GLAIVE ]:
-Necessary to melt tanks and enemies building Magic Defense.

hero.hero_overview:
Xavier, the Defier of Light, is a high-scaling mage who utilizes a unique "Transcendence" state to enhance his skills. He is 115th hero released in MLBB. He is one of the few heroes capable of global presence through his ultimate, making him a constant threat to low-HP enemies regardless of where they are.

Mastering Xavier requires a blend of patient positioning and rhythmic spell-casting. As a long-range artillery mage, he excels at controlling the battlefield and sniping enemies from across the map.


[ HERO SKILLS ]

✨PASSIVE SKILL (Transcendence): Every time Xavier hits an enemy with a skill, he gains a stack. At Stage III, his skills are enhanced (wider area/lower cooldowns) and he enters a state of high-energy output.

✨SKILL 1 (Infinite Extension): Fires a mystic bullet that passes through enemies. Its range increases every time it hits an enemy or his Skill 2 barrier.

✨SKILL 2 (Mystic Field): Creates a barrier that slows enemies and speeds up allies. If hit by Skill 1 or his Ultimate, it expands into a Forbidden Field, immobilizing enemies inside.

✨ULTIMATE (Dawning Light): Fires a global beam of light. It immediately puts Xavier into his Stage III Transcendence state.


[ HERO SKILL COMBO ]
✨Skill 2 + Skill 1 + Ultimate + Spam Skill 1
- Place the barrier (S2), immediately fire the bullet (S1) through it to trigger the immobilization, then finish with the ULTIMATE to burst and refresh your passive.
hero.hero_strength:
✨Incredible Range: Can poke and CC enemies from a very safe distance.

✨Global Presence: His ultimate can steal Lords, Turtles, or finish off retreating enemies anywhere.

✨Scaling: Becomes an absolute monster in the late game with high burst and low cooldowns.

✨Crowd Control: His S2 + S1 combo provides reliable AOE immobilization for team fights.
hero.hero_weakness:
✨Early Game Weakness: Low damage and high mana consumption before getting core items.

✨Lack of Mobility: No dash or escape skills; very vulnerable to assassins (Lancelot, Helcurt).

✨Skill Shot Reliant: Missing your Skill 1 or Skill 2 can leave you defenseless and ruin your passive stacks.

data.recommend: Unlock the secret skill rotations and the "One-Shot" build used by Top Globals to win using Xavier!

spell.spell_desc:
FLICKER (Recommended): Essential for repositioning or escaping when dived.



[ ALTERNATIVE BATTLE SPELLS ]:

SPRINT: A great alternative for kitting and maintaining distance from pursuit-heavy heroes.

PURIFY: Use this if the enemy team has heavy CC (like Atlas or Franco) that would prevent you from using Flicker.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Tigreal can gather and control enemies with his crowd control, making it easy for Xavier to hit multiple targets with his skills and ultimate safely from the back line.

counters.counter_desc: Lancelot can easily dash into Xavier and burst him down. Since Xavier has low mobility and is very squishy, he struggles against fast assassins like Lancelot.

dominants.dominant_desc: Stay at the back and always keep your distance. Use your skills to poke and clear waves safely, then help other lanes with your ultimate. Never overextend—proper positioning and timing are the key to playing Xavier right.

emblems.emblem_desc: The Mage Emblem helps Xavier deal stronger magic damage while solving his mana problems. Impure Rage allows him to poke enemies more often in lane and during team fights, making him more effective in the mid to late game.

equips.equip_desc: Cooldown reduction lets Xavier use his skills more often, allowing constant poke, wave clear, and control in team fights. Magic damage items increase the power of each skill, making his long-range attacks hurt more as fights go on. Together, this build helps Xavier pressure enemies safely and stay useful throughout the game.

hero.hero_overview: Xavier is a long-range mage who excels at dealing continuous magic damage and controlling team fights from a safe distance. He uses skills to poke enemies, clear waves fast, and support allies during clashes. Xavier is best played in the mid lane, where he can rotate and help other lanes using his global ultimate. His damage becomes stronger as fights last longer.
hero.hero_strength:
- Very long skill range, allowing safe poke and zoning
- Strong magic damage in mid to late game
- Global ultimate that can help finish enemies anywhere on the map
- Good wave clear and team fight presence
- Useful crowd control when skills are combined properly
hero.hero_weakness:
- Very weak mobility, easy target for assassins
- Squishy and relies heavily on positioning
- Needs good timing and accuracy with skills
- Early game ultimate damage is not very strong
- Punished easily when caught alone

data.recommend: Xavier is highly recommended for players who prefer a safe, strategic playstyle. He performs best when paired with crowd-control teammates and when built with cooldown reduction and magic damage. With

spell.spell_desc: Xavier is a mage with high damage but very low mobility, which is why Flicker is considered his best battle spell. (sprint works good too)

hero.hero_overview: In the early game you must stay playing safe until you have glowing wand, enchanted talisman, and magic boots. In the mid game you mustl spam your ult as much as possible to give vision and to poke the enemies from afar. Lastly at the late game you need to always hit the backline enemies for your ultimate can reach up to 2.5k magic damage making the enemy backline half hp making them easier to burst down by your teammates.

dominants.dominant_desc: I usually play safe and use my crown control for the team. I also need to manage my skills correctly and not let mana go to waste. After I scale up my damage I act as the burst finisher and try to snipe across the map

emblems.emblem_desc:
I use Rupture for early magic penetration so my skills deal meaningful damage from the laning phase instead of just poking.
Weapons Master amplifies all the magic power I gain from items, making my mid and late game spells scale much harder.
Lethal Ignition converts my repeated skill hits into burst damage, allowing my combos and ultimate to cross kill thresholds rather than leaving enemies low HP.
Together, these emblems turn Xavier from a slow poke mage into a burst artillery mage, where accurate positioning and spell hits are rewarded with decisive damage in teamfights and objective fights.

equips.equip_desc: High damage burst with one shot ability

hero.hero_overview: Xavier is a scaling control mage who dominates fights through zoning, vision control, and long-range damage. He rewards players with strong map awareness and patience rather than raw mechanics.
hero.hero_strength:
Extremely long range (safe damage dealer)
Strong wave clear mid priority
Excellent objective pressure (Turtle/Lord snipes)
Massive teamfight impact with Dawning Light
Scales very well into late game.
hero.hero_weakness:
No mobility   punishable by assassins
Weak early 1v1 before items
Heavily reliant on positioning
Needs protection vs dive comps

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Badang bisa ngunci lawan dengan dindingnya, dan Xavier tinggal lempar skill 1/2 atau ulti untuk burst. Kombinasi ini bikin musuh susah kabur.

counters.counter_desc: Diggie bisa buka CC Xavier dan melindungi timnya. Tapi Xavier bisa tetap menang dari jarak jauh, asalkan tidak berdiri terlalu depan.

dominants.dominant_desc: Xavier bersinar di momen war gede, terutama setelah dapat Transcendence Stack. Zoning dari skill 2 dan burst skill 1 bisa bikin musuh ragu buat maju.
Clear wave aman dari jarak jauh membuat Xavier jarang kalah lane, bahkan saat lawan hero poke lain. Setelah level 4, dia bisa bantu kill di sidelane dengan ultimate global.
Musuh melee biasanya susah masuk karena slow + root dari skillnya. Kamu tinggal jaga jarak, spam skill, musuh pasti kapok maju.

emblems.emblem_desc:
Impure Rage: buat spam skill + regen mana.
Rupture: tambah Magic Pen supaya poke sakit.
Bargain Hunter: bantu beli item lebih cepat biar tembus power spike.

equips.equip_desc:
Build ini fokus untuk ngasih Xavier damage yang stabil dari early sampai late game, sekaligus memastikan dia bisa spam skill tanpa takut kehabisan mana. Enchanted Talisman adalah item kunci yang bikin cooldown cepat dan mana selalu aman. Arcane Boots menambah Magic Penetration supaya poke Xavier lebih sakit sejak awal. Glowing Wand bantu ngasih damage tambahan lewat efek burn, cocok karena Xavier sering mengenai musuh berkali-kali.

Masuk mid game, Wishing Lantern dipilih untuk nambah Magic Pen dan sustain saat Xavier mulai ikut teamfight besar. Holy Crystal ngasih lonjakan Magic Power yang bikin ultimate dan skill 1 jadi makin pedih. Divine Glaive dipakai sebagai item penutup untuk menembus Magic Defense musuh di late game, terutama tank atau fighter yang mulai tebal.

Dengan build ini, Xavier bisa jaga jarak aman, spam skill terus, dan tetap punya burst yang kuat di momen penting.

hero.hero_overview:
Xavier adalah mage jarak jauh yang tugas utamanya nge-zone musuh, poke sebelum war, dan nge-clear wave dari jarak aman. Keunggulan terbesar Xavier adalah ultinya yang bisa menghantam musuh dari seluruh map, bikin dia bisa bantu objektif atau finishing kill tanpa harus pindah lane.

Secara playstyle, Xavier cocok banget untuk pemain yang suka bermain aman tapi tetap berpengaruh besar dalam teamfight.
hero.hero_strength:
avier itu kuat banget ketika tim lawan dipenuhi fighter atau hero tanpa burst cepet. Skill 2-nya bisa nge-root dan memperlambat pergerakan musuh, bikin dia unggul dalam trade. Selain itu, ultimate global miliknya bisa bantu tim menangin fight walau kamu lagi fokus clear lane.

Keunggulan lain: Kalau sudah masuk mode Transcendence, damage skill 1 dan skill 3 benar-benar menggila. Momen ini biasanya menentukan hasil teamfight.
hero.hero_weakness:
Kelemahan Xavier yang paling kerasa adalah mobilitasnya nol besar. Dia nggak punya dash atau blink, jadi gampang ditarget assassin seperti Lancelot atau Hayabusa. CC berat juga bikin dia cuma bisa pasrah kalau positioning-nya salah.

Karena itu, Flicker jadi penyelamat utama. Kalau support atau roamer kamu nggak nge-cover dengan baik, Xavier bisa mati cepat sebelum sempat nge-spam skill.

data.recommend: Optimal untuk performa ranked—cooldown cepat, poke tebal, dan tembus Magic Defense musuh di late game.

spell.spell_desc: Flicker sangat membantu Xavier kabur dari assassin atau fighter yang tiba-tiba lompat. Sesekali bisa dipakai buat repositioning saat mau tembak ultimate.

cooperates.cooperate_desc:
. Frontline/Tank:
Tigreal: A strong choice for setting up Xavier's damage and CC.
Khufra: Another option for setting up Xavier's skills with his unique abilities.
Chou, Jawhead, Ruby: These fighters can protect Xavier with their CC and tankiness.

counters.counter_desc: Fanny is the perfect hero to exploit this fact, for she can swoop in and out of a team fight with her cables, making it extremely hard for anyone to land skill shots.

dominants.dominant_desc:
His skills allow you to poke, zone, and lock down enemies, making him a dominant force in team fights.

Cast Mystic Field to slow or immobilize enemies, then follow with Infinite Extension to extend the field and deal damage. Finish with Dawning Light to secure kills or hit multiple targets. This simple yet effective combo makes Xavier a threat in both skirmishes and full team fights.

emblems.emblem_desc:
1.Take Rupture as your tier one talent. The extra penetration allows you to poke enemies more effectively and clear lanes faster in the early game.

2.Go for Wildnerness Blessing as your second talent. The extra movement speed in the jungle and river area is extremely helpful especially when you are trying to help out or respond to other lanes. More than that, it also gives you more mobility to position better in objective takes.

3.Finally, take Impure Rage as your main talent. This allows you to add extra damage to your skills, making you more lethal from long range. Since you deal damage using skills, the mana restoration effects also benefits you tremendously.
Bargain hunter low cost of item for 5%

hero.hero_overview:
mage hero Xavier bends the battlefield to his will with his long-range abilities and devastating burst damage.

He is the first hero in the Land of Dawn to have a global ultimate skill called Dawning Light.
hero.hero_strength:
A mage who thrives on precision and timing, Xavier excels at controlling crowds and sniping enemies from afar. His power grows as the fight goes on, allowing him to unleash overwhelming damage when his skills align.His skills allow you to poke, zone, and lock down enemies, ing him a dominant force in team fights.

Strength:

Strong early game.
High damage.
Good poke/harass.
High burst.
Good CC.
hero.hero_weakness:
Weakness:

Struggles at the early game.
Lacks mobility skills.

spell.spell_desc: Flicker fits Xavier perfectly, for it gives him a layer of mobility either when engaging or retreating from fights.
